title: Three Polluted Sitemap URL Fix Log

fixes.action: Added to NOINDEXED_VARIANT_SLUGS blocklist in sitemap.ts (line 199). This prevents it from being included in sitemap generation.
fixes.verification: Will confirm excluded from sitemap after deploy

fixes.issue: noindex meta but GSC-exempted in sitemap
fixes.action: Removed from TOOL_GSC_SLUGS exemption set (line 188). isFormulaVariant() now correctly filters it out (has pct + yr pattern).
fixes.verification: Will confirm excluded from sitemap after deploy

fixes.issue: noindex meta but GSC-exempted in sitemap
fixes.action: Removed from TOOL_GSC_SLUGS exemption set (line 188). isFormulaVariant() now correctly filters it out.
fixes.verification: Will confirm excluded from sitemap after deploy

summary: 3 URLs removed from sitemap. No pages deleted, no redirects created, no indexability changed. This is a sitemap-only fix — pages remain live as-is.
